mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mq_dead_letter (biz_type, request_id, user_id, product_id, message_body, fail_reason, retry_count, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{bizType}, #{requestId}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{messageBody}, #{failReason}, #{retryCount}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM mq_dead_letter WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM mq_dead_letter WHERE request_id = #{requestId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE mq_dead_letter SET status = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
UPDATE mq_dead_letter SET status = 2, handler_admin_id = #{handlerAdminId}, handle_remark = #{handleRemark}, handle_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN (0, 1)
